title: Merge Research and Clean Worktrees
content:
## Context  
Multiple research worktrees contain valuable content that needs merging or archiving.

## Worktrees to Process

### High Value - Merge Content:
- 92a03d31: Ashwagandha synthesis (1103 lines)
- e29c0fb7: Tickly cough synthesis (888 lines)
- d4fb91fb: Demulcent herbs research (766 lines)
- 1e3e28a7: Ashwagandha traditional (872 lines)

### Has Commits - Review & Merge:
- c7f58790: Improved tickly-cough protocol
- 3c185f67: QC edited version (if complete)

### Archive for Reference:
- All Stage 1 bibliographies
- All Stage 2 research summaries
- Original research from first attempts

## Process
1. Review each worktree with `skein shard review`
2. Merge valuable research to research/ directory
3. Merge improved protocols to content/
4. Archive raw research for future reference
5. Clean up worktrees after merging

## Special Attention
- The ashwagandha synthesis is particularly valuable
- Multiple demulcent research files should be consolidated
- Keep bibliographies for future batches

## Commands
```bash
# Review
skein shard triage

# Merge good content
git merge shard-[id]
git worktree remove worktrees/[id]

# Archive research
mkdir -p research/archive/2025-12-29/
cp worktrees/*/research/* research/archive/2025-12-29/
```
